global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with prominent text and a product placeholder.
global.main_message: Promoting a product with free shipping and an attractive price.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A simple, light-colored rectangular shape representing a product, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: A small, abstract decorative shape in the top left corner, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An undefined element located in the center bottom, possibly a placeholder or decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another undefined element positioned slightly above the bottom center, likely decorative.

elements.label: ZenDrop ALE UGC
elements.description: Bold, large text reading 'ZenDrop ALE UGC' at the top, prominently displayed.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: Clear, inviting text stating 'Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25' in the center.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text displaying the price '€9.99' located near the bottom, indicating affordability.
